title: MR.Meeseeks
body:
Mr.Meeseeks is a fiction charecter from the show **[Rick And Morty](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rick_and_Morty)** Whose role is to fullfill tasks he is given, we have given you the power of the meeseeks box its up to you what you want to complete... Just dont keep them around to long...

_Note: This mod is no longer being worked on please do not expect any updates_

[![Join My Discord](https://i.imgur.com/4ocuGQB.png)](https://discord.gg/3qCU9bGPmt)
[![Visit My YouTube](https://i.imgur.com/4vYrWcC.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@SimplyMelonHaverMC)
